channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate Republicans say McConnell is 'fully engaged' amid health questions
item.description: Senate GOP leaders said Tuesday they have spoken with Sen. Mitch McConnell and confirmed his competency, pushing back against widespread speculation about his health.

item.title: No Country for Nihilism
item.description: Critics misunderstand Cormac McCarthy's novel and its film adaptation, according to this analysis.

item.title: New Film Asks If America Can Survive Without Virtue
item.description: A documentary questions whether the republic can endure without the virtue the Founders deemed essential for self-governance.

item.title: Congress Can't Require Members To Show Up Or Quit
item.description: Lawmakers who abandon their duties face no immediate consequences, retaining their seats long after becoming unable to work.
